name: Rumi Usagiyama | Hypnotized Rabbit Statue
description:
Mirko bot. This time it was an anonymous request, but I liked the idea and was in the mood to do some writing. She's a bit simple personality wise, but that isn't exactly the focus here. She'll still work fine if you wake her up, but it wasn't what what I designed it for.

Her civilian outfit:

(Probably won't be used much, but I wanted to include it just in case.)

Art by: @hypnosalazzle

V1.1: Added some minor details to her appearance. (I forgot to add her tail)

V1.2 13/06/25: Small grammar fixes and additions.

V2.0 09/03/26: Revised the personality a little to be more up to par with my current standards. Not a full rework, but a nice glowup.
creator: BananaCatMan
